statement: Adaptive IG reaches |Ĉ-C| <= 0.05 with median-shot improvement over fixed policy (ratio fixed/adaptive=4.00).
reproduce: python -m src.main --mode sweep --backend sim --noise ideal --policy adaptive --g_grid 0.00,0.10,0.20,0.35,0.50,0.70,0.90 --shots <SHOT> --seed <SEED> --n_train 40 --n_cal 10 --n_test 12 --rounds 6 --export_dir artifacts/raw/sim_sweeps/seed_<SEED>_shots_<SHOT>
notes: Computed by scanning shot ladder per (seed,state_id) and taking first shot where abs_err_c <= epsilon.

statement: Adaptive IG empirical coverage: cov90=0.976, cov95=0.976.
reproduce: python -m src.main --mode sweep --backend sim --noise ideal --policy adaptive --g_grid 0.00,0.10,0.20,0.35,0.50,0.70,0.90 --shots <SHOT> --seed <SEED> --n_train 40 --n_cal 10 --n_test 12 --rounds 6 --export_dir artifacts/raw/sim_sweeps/seed_<SEED>_shots_<SHOT>
notes: Coverage computed from ci90/ci95 bounds against c_true over all simulation test rows.

statement: IBM hardware run was attempted but blocked by unavailable Qiskit runtime dependencies in the execution environment.
reproduce: python -m src.main --mode hardware_run --backend ibm --ibm_backend_name ibm_kyoto --policy adaptive --g_grid 0.10,0.35,0.50 --shots 1024 --seed 0 --export_dir artifacts/raw/ibm_runs/adaptive_s0_sh1024
notes: Failure occurs before submission, so no IBM job IDs were created.
